element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundational mechanic for all subsequent levels
Adds mobility and tactical variation to bomb placement
Introduces environmental theming and potentially hazards
End-game confrontation with evil Bagular and robot army

typical_relief_triggers: Safe zone positioning between bomb explosions
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Action-maze hybrid with escalating environmental complexity across six themed worlds, moving from jungle baseline through volcanic, aquatic, and castle environments to final boss confrontation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Jammin' Jungle introduces core bomb-and-maze mechanics with basic enemies in safe pacing
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Vexin' Volcano and Slammin' Sea introduce environmental theming and heightened creature threats; animal powerups provide tactical depth
difficulty_curve.late_game: Crankin' Castle and Thrashin' Tundra present compounded environmental and enemy challenges; Bagular's comet serves as final test requiring mastery of all elements
notable_spikes: Transition from Jammin' Jungle to Vexin' Volcano (first environmental complexity)
Bagular's artificial comet final boss area

notable_level_patterns.description: Six distinct worlds each with thematic environment (Jungle, Volcano, Sea, Castle, Tundra, artificial comet), each presumably introducing spatial or hazard variations tied to theme
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Jammin' Jungle (baseline), Vexin' Volcano (fire/heat theme), Slammin' Sea (water constraints)

notable_level_patterns.description: Basic enemies present from early levels, with creature count and variety increasing through world progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All worlds, with escalation through Crankin' Castle and Thrashin' Tundra

notable_level_patterns.description: Louie animal powerups introduced early and distributed throughout levels to add mobility and tactical bomb-placement variation
Bagular's artificial comet world as isolated final challenge requiring synthesis of all learned mechanics against robot army and primary antagonist
